{{Quote|Better going down in flames than dying of ''food poisoning'' in that cell. The womp rat stew was stomach-churning.|[[Esu]], to [[Kessk]]|<ref name="Lockdown (comic)">{{TCWComicCite|6.47|Lockdown (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''Womp rat stew''', sometimes called '''mystery stew''', was a dish that was served at [[Jun Seros (Whiphid)|Jun Seros]]' diner in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
